articles.title: Reports: Rishabh Pant was sacked from his role as LSG skipper

articles.title: 'He is scoring runs, but his name is still not coming' - Aakash Chopra on Yashasvi Jaiswal's omission for ODIs vs England

articles.title: 'I think I'm a failure as a captain' - Chamari Athapaththu expresses sorrow after Sri Lanka's defeat to West Indies in Women's T20 World Cup 2026
articles.description: "I think I played around 18 years for the national team, and I could never get a chance to take my team into a semi-final of a World Cup," Chamari Athapaththu said.
